explanation: The user wants to put an object (potato) into the same cabinet as others. From the state, potato_2 is on the countertop and is the only new potato not in a cabinet. The user refers to 'the same cabinet', which corresponds to cabinet_4, as it already contains other potatoes. Since the robot is not currently holding any object, it first needs to pick up potato_2. After picking it up, it should place it into cabinet_4, which is already open and accessible. This action aligns with the user's instruction to 'put it in the same cabinet'.
